title: Multiple forms to one board
excerpt: Hello - I have Monday forms on different landing pages on our website. All the forms go to one board where we sort and assign all incoming leads and questions. I want to be able to tell what leads/questions came in on wh…

posts.author: drosen (David Rosenbrock)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello - I have Monday forms on different landing pages on our website. All the forms go to one board where we sort and assign all incoming leads and questions. I want to be able to tell what leads/questions came in on what landing page. Is it possible to do that?

posts.author: mark.anley (Green Llamas Consulting)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @drosen - the easiest way to manage this would be to separate the form submissions into thier own groups. You can then run automations on creation of the forms based on group. You can manage this in the Customize >> monday.com settings within Workforms:

image301×645 22.7 KB

Hope this helps!
Mark

Green Llamas

monday.com + Green Llamas

Green Llamas is here to help you make all your People and Projects Green. Let us get your herds under control using the monday.com platform.

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @drosen

Nachliel from Easyapps here

Our Monday form builder app, Easyform, supports setting a default value for Status, Dropdown, and Connected Board columns, as well as Groups, giving you more flexibility in setting up your forms and boards. You can read more about this feature here.

In addition, our forms are great for embedding in your webpage since we allow you to style every feature in the form so you can embed it seamlessly on your site. Here is an example of a Contact Us form embedded in a Wix website:

Other advanced features we offer:

  • Connected Board support:
    • Limiting selection to a single item.
    • Displaying items from multiple connected boards.
    • Limiting select options to items from specific boards where a column is connected to multiple boards.
    • Pro plan feature - item default values support - set default values for connected board columns hidden in the form.
  • Upload files to your board’s file columns, with support for:
    • Allowing only specific file types, such as images or pdf.
    • Limiting the number of files that can be uploaded.
    • Setting a maximum for file size.
    • Manually retrying uploads if some or all of them fail.
  • Add the item’s group as just another field to the form.
  • Control the page’s top margin with the ability to set different values for desktop and mobile. To do so, select Page from the Settings menu.

If you’re interested in creating styled forms that better match your brand and embed perfectly on your web page, you can check out our Monday.com app Easyform and our extensive documentation site.

You can set up a free demo here or contact us at support@easyappshq.com.

Here is an example of our form in action:

I hope this helps,

Nachliel
